task_completion.description: The slice controller options for the Red (Axial) view are expanded and visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Red slice view header, the controller panel is visible (expanded via the pushpin icon), revealing sliders and dropdowns for slice control.

task_completion.description: The Slab Mode is enabled (changed from the default 'None').
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Red slice controller panel, the 'Slab' section is visible and the mode dropdown indicates a selection other than 'None'.

task_completion.description: The Slab Mode is specifically set to 'Max' (Maximum Intensity Projection).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Slab Mode dropdown in the Red slice controller clearly displays the text 'Max'.

task_completion.description: The slab thickness is set to approximately 10mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The thickness slider or input field in the Slab section displays a value near '10.00 mm' or '10 mm'.

task_completion.description: The Red slice view displays a Maximum Intensity Projection, showing bright continuous vessels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The image in the Red view shows high-contrast, bright tubular structures (vessels) against a darker background, characteristic of MIP, rather than the standard grey texture of a single CT slice.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to configure settings rather than scripting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse interaction with the Slice Controller panel and dropdowns, not code entry in the Python console.

integrity.description: The agent is interacting with the 3D Slicer application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface matches 3D Slicer standard layout (module panel on left, slice views on right).

integrity.description: The agent did not simply display the solution text or instructions.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen does not show a text editor or browser with the specific solution steps pasted.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target application is 3D Slicer. The correct configuration is on the Red (Axial) slice view. The Slab Mode must be set to 'Max' (Maximum Intensity Projection). The target slab thickness is 10mm.
